creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Rodent fm 5.2.9 is available: http://sourceforge.net/projects/xffm/files/rodent/

Rodrigo, do you plan to update the port anytime soon? Cause it has some demand: https://github.com/AMDmi3/freebsd-ports/issues/2 and I was planning to try and update it myself if you have no time for at the moment.
